tasks.subject: Task 0: Add foundation design tokens to globals.css
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce new ink/paper/warm palette + typography scale in globals.css without removing existing Japanese-theme tokens.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/globals.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New tokens resolve as Tailwind utilities
- Old tokens still intact
- body defaults to ink background
- build + lint green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/globals.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new tokens resolve", "old tokens intact", "body defaults ink", "build+lint green"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Load Inter font in layout.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load Inter via next/font/google alongside Geist.

**Files:**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Inter loader wired", "variable on body", "themeColor matches ink", "build green"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Reskin Header with warm accent and display font
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update Header.tsx to use warm accent + font-display, preserving all functionality.

**Files:**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/layout/Header.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["header uses warm accent", "nav underline warm", "CTA border warm", "mobile hover warm", "JA toggle unchanged", "build+lint green"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create typed design-tokens module

tasks.subject: Task 4: Visual smoke test + user verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dev server up, user visually inspects, explicit sign-off captured before Phase 2.

**User Verification Required:** Must call AskUserQuestion with the verification prompt before marking complete.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dev server ready", "header reskin visible", "no existing section broken", "user sign-off captured"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "Phase 1 foundation is live on http://localhost:3000. Does the new ink+warm+Geist header reskin look right, and is every other existing section still rendering without visible breakage?"}
```
